The '''''Forbidden''''' was a modified [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]], which was assigned to [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. It had been modified by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for training purposes. It was intended to simulate an [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg-1 Star Wing assault gunboat]], and was equipped with a targeting system for [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. However, it did not have any launch tubes for such missiles, and was also stripped of its [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. The process of restoring the lasers would have taken at least an hour. The ''Forbidden'' was kept unarmed because it was piloted by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]], who was suspected by New Republic Intelligence of being an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sleeper agent/Legends|sleeper agent]]. Though the lack of weapons limited Celchu's ability to contribute in battle, he used the ''Forbidden'' to provide targeting data to other Rogue pilots, and to rescue downed pilots in battle. When piloting the ''Forbidden'', Celchu's callsign was Rogue Null.
